bits.premise: Sandwich requests seem minor compared with barbecue.
Beautiful low-crime wine country can imply racist exclusion.

lines.text: - So I don't know why women get all upset
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when you ask them to make them sandwich.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's not that hard.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's not like we're asking ladies to smoke us a brisket.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Takes time and patience.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Quality is the wish no woman possesses.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: So, black people can't get lice, just so you know.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, 97% of the cases are like white people,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: which makes sense if you think about it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause like, if I was a parasite,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I wouldn't have to feed off inferior blood either.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'd only want the best, and the purest blood from my family.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: My name is Paul Mendoza, I am from Napa, California.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's a very beautiful place, filled with beautiful people.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Very low crime.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: A lot of people know Napa is a wine country.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Well, they don't know that it's an acronym.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It stands for "No African People Loud."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But we do allow the Mexicans, you know,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the grave's not gonna pick themselves.
lines.label: punchline
